title: Teladoc Health Q3 2024 Earnings Call Summary
text: Teladoc Health Q3 2024 Earnings Call Summary. Key Financial Metrics - Consolidated Results: Q3 revenue $641 million (down 3% YoY), Adjusted EBITDA $83.3 million (down 6% YoY, 13% margin), Net loss per share $0.19 vs $0.35 in Q3 2023, Free cash flow $79 million (up 16% YoY), Cash position over $1.2 billion. Integrated Care Segment: Revenue $384 million (up 2.5% YoY) exceeded guidance, U.S. membership 93.9 million (up 4% YoY) above guidance, Chronic Care enrollment 1.18 million (up 5% YoY), Revenue per member $1.36 (flat sequentially, down $0.05 YoY), Adjusted EBITDA $68 million (up 8% YoY), Adjusted EBITDA margin 17.7%. BetterHelp Segment: Revenue $257 million (down 10% YoY), Average paying users down 13% YoY, down 2% sequentially, Adjusted EBITDA $15.2 million, Adjusted EBITDA margin 5.9%. Management Commentary: CEO Chuck Divita highlighted strong Integrated Care results and organizational restructuring. CFO Mala Murthy noted 2025 Integrated Care revenue guidance flat to up 2.5% and expectations of 14.9% to 15.3% adjusted EBITDA margin.
